name: XM for Employee Experience
description: XM for Employee Experience is software that boosts engagement, enhances manager effectiveness, and enables AI-driven decision-making. Learn more about XM for Employee Experience
review_page_title: Reviews of XM for Employee Experience

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Easy data collection, lots of survey questionnaire functionality
reviews.review_pros: Whenever I call customer service, I get a knowledgeable rep *quickly* on the phone who solves my issues. They are all very well-trained and well-versed in the platform.
reviews.review_cons: I wish it was a tad more user friendly, and the reporting out of it is not sufficient for my organizations needs, so we end up exporting the data, running our own crosstabs and filters, and creating out own graphs for reports.

reviews.review_pros: Qualtrics makes me feel POWERFUL and IN CONTROL. It lets me translate a mess of numbers into meaningful, actionable information that my company can really use. With Qualtrics, I can see opportunities that I was blind to before. The tool is extremely user-friendly, so I spend minimal time learning how to use the tool and can dedicate most of my time to solving problems using the data Qualtrics lets me gather and analyze. But, when I do need a little extra help, the Qualtrics support team is always there for me. I can, of course, search for information online. But I prefer to call the support team. Their reps all have the heart of a teacher. They take the time to teach me how to navigate my way through the challenges I face when designing complex surveys or learning a new element of the tool. Their support team - more than anything - makes me absolutely LOVE Qualtrics. That support team makes this tool worth every penny....and then some.
reviews.review_cons: I wish the dashboard functionality was available for every survey type. We love the dashboards - prefer them over reports - and would love to have unlimited ability to create and share them.

reviews.review_title: Great for large company employee feedback
reviews.review_description: Not for a smaller org but great option for large scale employee feedback collection.
reviews.review_pros: Great for large scale employee feedback but overkill for smaller orgs.
reviews.review_cons: Customer support is lacking and can be complicated to set up the logic for the surveys.

reviews.review_title: Easy to use employee satisfaction survey software
reviews.review_pros: Easy to personalize survey software to help gauge employee satisfaction, resulting in an easy to read graph showing the strengths and weakness of the business
reviews.review_cons: Takes some time to set up the questions and the way in which the results will show afterward, however it is well worth the time spent.

reviews.review_pros: As a startup, it's important that the people who work at your company are also gung-ho about the product and company. This platform helps us to understand our employee behavior, how they like our product, and also their experience in the company.
reviews.review_cons: Again, similar to a lot of Qualtrics products, if you're not data-minded, it can be daunting to look at a ton of numbers and graphs. Once you get past that, you'll find the insights amazing.

reviews.review_title: Easy to use. Easy to get results.
reviews.review_description: The survey was very easy to put together, very easy to post on social media as well as E-mail and the results were easy to read and download.
reviews.review_pros: The best part about Qualtrics are the built in graphs in the reports section.
reviews.review_cons: I ran a survey with 7 different multiple choice entries. I used the automatic choices, but it was difficult to find what I wanted because they were not alpha order.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Overall, it is great as mentioned in the pros.
reviews.review_pros: I like that there is a lot of traffic on the website so people will take the survey. You can get very good data and feedback. It creates charts for you so I just love it.
reviews.review_cons: I did not see any cons, I just wish multiple people can run one survey.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: Using Qualtrics has been great. The software for the most part is all very intuitive and for any questions that I might have, support is quick to help out.
reviews.review_pros: Qualtrics support were quick and helpful in responding to my problems. i
reviews.review_cons: Found myself bouncing between support contacts

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: Extremely user-friendly. I would go as far to call it the gold-standard in survey software.
reviews.review_cons: Honestly I cannot think of a con to this software.

reviews.review_title: Helpful for our New Hire Surveys
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: Our Talent Acquisition Team has been able to formulate and integrate our New Hire surveys, along with our 30 day follow-up surveys into Qualtrics. The interface and design is both easy to use and visually appealing.
reviews.review_cons: At this point, no real cons to complain about.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: My overall experience with XM for Employee Experience is decent
reviews.review_pros: The most i like about XM is its easy to measure and improve every interaction with people
reviews.review_cons: The least i like about XM is its bit slow

reviews.review_title: Fantastic survey software that can do almost anything but is a little too complicated at times
reviews.review_description: Expensive, can do anything analytic-wise but a little complicated to use.
reviews.review_pros: Fantastic software that lets you do almost anything when it comes to surveys and analyzing survey results. We used the employee engagement features and they worked terrific, were anonymous and got us the analyzed results we were looking for. I appreciated the details you can upload to describe the office and department and location for employees - this made it great to view results according to different categories.
reviews.review_cons: Onboarding set up was a little too lengthy. Customer service was horrible -- not the people on the other line but the wait times - sometimes up to 2 hours being on hold and then not getting a call back or email response. The survey software can do everything -- but it's not the most user friendly. The format is a little complicated at times and for someone with no analytics background, it was difficult to determine what each button meant and how to access certain features or view my results a certain way. This lead to me calling customer support numerous times for help.

reviews.review_description: it's our standard survey tool, and does everything we need it to (and more!)
reviews.review_pros: easy question routing, lots of answer-type options, good analytics.
reviews.review_cons: sometimes fiddly UI - eg the survey list unfilters itself after each search, and moving questions around can be laborious.

reviews.review_title: Robert H. Smith School of Business experience with Qualtrics 360
reviews.review_description: We have been using Qualtrics 360 for teaching leadership development and team skills to undergraduate, MBA and EMBA students for approximately 5 years. We've developed our own 360 tool for use with students as well as a number of team feedback applications. Some faculty are also using it for research purposes; it does a great job of collecting social network information.
reviews.review_pros: Once the survey and report format are set up, it's extremely easy to administer even to large groups. The customer support is outstanding; it's rare that I have a question or concern and don't hear back within a couple of hours--often with accompanying video showing how to fix whatever the issue is. The surveys follow Qualtrics format, which makes them easy to set up and administer. It's easy to get information quickly about response rates and to program in reminders.
reviews.review_cons: It can be challenging to format the reports to show the precise group-level information you want. That said, the outstanding customer support helps a lot with this.

reviews.review_description: Qualtrics is a good tool overall! I will still keep using as it helps me in my reports and summaries.
reviews.review_pros: I like this because at work I am in charge of reporting the survey results and reports for the school.
reviews.review_cons: Sometimes it is hard for me to recap the summary and when I copy and recreate a survey form, I find it hard to copy and edit.

reviews.review_description: I would say that it's good but not great. I can do what I need to do, but wish I knew more about what it can do for me.
reviews.review_pros: The ability to produce and delivery surveys to specific audiences.
reviews.review_cons: The use interface is not very user friendly and some of the changes that have happened over the past couple of years came without warning, leaving me to try to figure out the user interface and how to use the tool all over again with no support.

reviews.review_title: Rapid response, friendly staff, alert to follow up.
reviews.review_description: I always get a quick reply to questions whether they be simple, complex or related to services offered in addition to the survey software. Friendly staff engages in polite conversation after the service issue is solved. I like being able to get to know the staff on a personal level. It helps me to trust that I can call them whenever the need arises. Staff always makes a follow-up the date for all information I need to send them. This helps keep me on task and shows their concern for my projects.
reviews.review_pros: ease of use, multiple functions
reviews.review_cons: um...can't think of one thing!

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_pros: Could do everything you could want it to do, and more!
reviews.review_cons: Could be complicated to set up complex surveys and you need to be quite technically minded if uploading hierarchy into the system. Great that it has the capability to do this though.

reviews.review_pros: Qualtrics is a powerful, helpful, and intuitive surveying tool.
reviews.review_cons: The interface takes some fiddling with before you can use it comfortably.

reviews.review_pros: Good capture of how we want to gather information from internal and external customers for how we are doing.
reviews.review_cons: I use it more for viewing and searching. The output doesn't always make sense to me. It could be that I don't know how to use it as well. Easy enough to intuitively to get around. I marked 3 for some b/c I don't know the cost and have not had to contact for customer support.

reviews.review_title: Great way to hear from employees
reviews.review_pros: Ease of use, easy to set up and administer employee satisfaction surveys, simple design allows beginners to use as well
reviews.review_cons: It was pricey to buy for what I wanted, not widely available to purchase, very specific use would like it to be more diversified in survey making

reviews.review_pros: The interface is easy to use and the system itself is really intuitive. It's a very helpful way to collect data
reviews.review_cons: Sometime the way that the system is set up means it can be a bit inflexible, however, I'm usually able to overcome this issue

reviews.review_pros: The thing I liked most about this software was that it was easy to use.
reviews.review_cons: The thing I liked the least about this software was its overall design.

reviews.review_description: Qualtrics makes life way easier. I love how simple they make it to retrieve your results. Price is hard to beat!
Great product for getting information. I'd like to be able to do more with the software, its relatively simple. but the cost represents that
